training_status: former athlete, currently active (e.g. pressure washing house)
health_conditions: complex health issues (unspecified, 30 years of health disasters)

benefits.description: Lost more than 50 lbs; 10 lbs from goal weight
Clearly revved up metabolism; went from zero energy to spending day pressure washing house
Described as closest to an antidote for complex health issues; metabolic boost and fat burning achieved when appetite suppression alone was insufficient

protocol_notes: Started at 2mg, titrated up to 4mg. Has not tried Tirzepatide. Previously needed 800 cal/day to maintain goal weight, which caused zero energy. Reta achieved results without that restriction.
